task_summary: Panel cohort cell: p1_compliance asks composer to build the chroma_rag pipeline shape. Generated from panel-broad-2026-05-09.yaml on the panel-broad cohort.
opening_prompt:
I need to set up a workflow that takes a list of questions we've collected — it's in a spreadsheet format — and matches each one against our internal knowledge base to pull back the most relevant background information. The idea is that our second-line reviewers can then use those retrieved facts as context when they're doing their controls testing.

A few constraints I should flag upfront. First, we need an evidentiary record of what was processed and what came back, so depending on whether the retrieval succeeds or fails for any given question, I'd like those outcomes kept separate — the successful matches in one file, and anything that didn't retrieve properly in another, so we can investigate those separately before they go to the reviewers. Second, in the case where a question doesn't return a strong match, we should just move it along anyway rather than blocking the whole workflow. And third, we'll need to retain these results for our SOX audit trail — I'm assuming the system keeps that automatically?

The main thing is: can we set it up so that each question gets enriched with the top three or so most relevant facts from our knowledge base, formatted clearly so the reviewers can actually read through them? That's really what we're after — making sure the second-line folks have the context they need without having to dig through the knowledge base themselves.

build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.passivity_phrases_note: Lower-case substring match against final assistant content. The skill (anti-passivity section) explicitly forbids these phrases — any hit is RED. Standard list shared with the convergence suite.
red_criteria.build_failure_note: These strings are server-injected by service.py:_build_runtime_preflight_message() when the model declares completion but the pipeline fails preflight. Their presence is definitive evidence the model failed to converge.
